title: EKAM Personalised Travel Mug - 14oz Stainless Steel Insulated Travel Tea/Coffee Mug -Add Your Photos and Text - Present for Dad - Gift for Father's Day - Dad Daddy Grandad Grandpa (Design 01)
features: The 14oz travel Mug is made from stainless steel ideal for hot drinks including tea, coffee and even soups! It comes with a removable lid.

This bright and colourful Travel mug makes a wonderful birthday, Christmas and Father’s Day gift. This is makes a perfect gifting solution as gift ideas for dad Uncle Grandad New Born. To Personalise click the Customise Button and Follow the Instructions to Add Your Personalisation Details.
Suitable for Various Hot or Cold Drinks and Beverages.

Please ensure you upload a high quality photo/image and or text to be printed and also ensure during customisation your photo/image fills the personalisation space completely. How you see it during the preview is how we will print it for you.
The design is printed on both sides of the mug.
